articles.author: Alejandro Avila
articles.title: Iran’s Women’s Team Keeps It Silent Through Anthem Amid Supreme Leader’s Death, Regime Turmoil - OutKick
articles.description: The Iranian Women’s National Team stood on a soccer pitch in Australia and did the one thing the Mullahs have spent decades trying to prevent: they stopped obeying.
articles.content:
Iran’s women arrived at the Women’s Asian Cup in Australia and, before kickoff, delivered a moment that landed far beyond soccer.
As Iran’s national anthem played ahead of the opener on the Gold Coa… [+2537 chars]
